title: beringia bursifolia subsp. virgata
intro: Beringia bursifolia subsp. virgata is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae, native to the mountainous regions of the western United States and parts of Canada. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Beringia bursifolia subsp. virgata include its potential to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared into various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
